body:
**Preferred term label:**
sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion

**Synonyms**

1. L6 dorsal root ganglion;  
2.  sixth lumbar spinal ganglion 

**Definition (free text, please give PubMed ID)**

The group of nerve cell bodies located on the dorsal spinal roots within the vertebral column at the level of the sixth lumbar vertebra.
PMID:18316160

**Parent term (use https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon)**

lumbar dorsal root ganglion (UBERON:0002836)

**Your nano-attribution (ORCID)**

ORCID:0000-0002-8037-076X

comments.body:
@dragon-ai-agent  - please add this term.

(I have checked the paper and the def, all looks good).

title: sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion
